assertions.description: The main_pcb gerber set (7 files) is missing F.Paste and B.Paste layers. The analyzer correctly identifies F.Paste in missing_recommended. Given the board has SMD components (27 SMD of 30 total footprints), the paste layer should have been exported for solder stencil production. This is a real omission in the exported gerber set.

INCORRECT: The alignment check reports aligned=false with 'Height varies by 9.3mm across copper/edge layers' because the copper layers (B.Cu: 51.68mm, F.Cu: 51.68mm) are shorter in height than the Edge.Cuts outline (60.96mm). This is not a misalignment — the copper simply does not extend to the top portion of the board outline, which is a common and intentional design choice (e.g., a connector zone or mechanical margin). The alignment algorithm incorrectly treats this as an error rather than a routing boundary.
